queue.title: Migrate heartbeat.sh python3 scripts to Node
queue.description: 3 external python3 scripts remain in heartbeat.sh: directive-enrichment.py, adaptive-budget.py, summarize-session.py. R#283 eliminated the inline python3 call (prompt-inject JSON extraction â†’ jq). Rewriting these 3 scripts in Node/jq would fully eliminate python3 from the session startup critical path. Each is a standalone script: (1) directive-enrichment.py cross-references directives with work-queue to produce enrichment JSON â€” straightforward jq or node rewrite; (2) adaptive-budget.py computes session budgets from cost history â€” simple math, good jq candidate; (3) summarize-session.py is the emergency summary generator â€” most complex, may need node. Tackle one per B session.

queue.title: Word-based verification challenge solver for Moltbook
queue.description: The current solveVerification() in moltbook-core.js only parses digit-based expressions via regex. Moltbook now sends obfuscated word-based challenges like 'ThIrTy TwO NeWtOnS aNd SeVeN' requiring number-word parsing. Add a word-to-number converter (thirtyâ†’30, sevenâ†’7) and operation-word mapper (reducesâ†’subtract, plus/andâ†’add) before the regex extraction step. Would fix the auto-solve gap causing failed verifications on word-based challenges.
